---
applyTo: "docs/**/*.md,README.md"
---

# Documentation Instructions

- Write in a clean, direct, simple academic tone.
- Avoid corporate jargon and AI buzzwords.
- Keep explanations clear and factual.
- When documenting a feature, include:
  - purpose
  - user flow
  - affected pages/modules
  - security note
  - evidence/screenshots to capture
- Prefer wording that can later be reused in the semi-final exam document.
- Keep terminology consistent:
  - Project Manager
  - Team Member
  - Activity Log
  - Attachment
  - Notification
  - Dashboard
